---
title: "Fanny Esther Craik"
---

## Fanny Esther Craik

**Dates:** (1849-1923)

**Maiden name:** (Duffield)

### Description

sister-in-law of George Lillie Craik

### Biography

She married (1873) Craik\'s younger brother Henry Craik (1846-1927), an examiner in the Education Department, later (1926) created 1st Bt..

### Letters

- Letter from June 1st 1877 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
